structural_variants.structure: One age line (often 'Age 21') plus N checkboxes for contribution types.
detection_rules: question_text contains 'Age' and numeric (e.g., 21) OR a single numeric entry
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Replicate the age value across selected contribution types; absent checkbox ⇒ no mapping for that type.

structural_variants.structure: A separate age selection per contribution type (checkbox + textbox or per-type items).
detection_rules: Per-type rows: Pre-Tax, Roth, Matching, Profit Sharing, Safe Harbor/QACA, QNEC
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Each contribution type maps to an independent age node (same canonical field + dimension binding).

structural_variants.structure: Single radio: 'Entry date same for all' vs 'different dates apply'.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: If 'same for all' → apply one frequency to contribution_type=all; else spawn child entries per type.

structural_variants.structure: Preset frequencies (Monthly/Quarterly/…) plus 'Other' with per-type text fill-ins.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Preset → direct enum. 'Other' → set frequency=other and pull per-type strings into eligibility.entry.other_text with dimension bindings.

structural_variants.structure: Multi-select menu: elapsed time, hours of service (with alternatives), equivalency, numeric hours.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Normalize to enum; if numeric hours present, set eligibility.service.hours_required.

structural_variants.structure: Checkboxes for '6-year graded', '4-year graded', '3-year cliff', or 'Other' with free grid.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Map presets to schedule.type and graded/cliff parameters; Other → schedule.text.

structural_variants.structure: Part B with option sets per contribution source.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Bind schedule objects per source (matching vs profit sharing) to the appropriate canonical fields.

structural_variants.structure: One-of formula family (fixed, tiered, YOS, discretionary) with optional 'Other: text'.
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Set enum; capture supplemental percentages/tiers into adjacent canonical fields.

structural_variants.structure: Single-select Yes/No question tied to catch-up matching.
Menu with suboptions (min $, max loans, home loan term, account restrictions, hardship-only).
structural_variants.transformation_rules: Set loans.available=true if menu present; map each suboption to respective canonical fields.

structural_variants.structure: Single-select permitting hardship due to primary beneficiary.
